reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para descansar un rato. No tenía efectivo para comprar la ficha de 50 pesos para el agua del termo y ofrecí comprar algo para que me lo cobre con débito o mercado pago. No me dejaron. En otras estaciones del ACA me lo ofrecieron así para no irme sin agua. Eso no me gustó. Hicimos 2km y de esta manera cargue en otra estación.

(Translated by Google)
A nice place to rest for a while. I didn't have cash to buy the 50-peso token for the water from the thermos, so I offered to buy something so they could charge me with a debit card or Mercado Pago. They didn't let me. At other ACA stations, they offered to do it this way so I wouldn't leave without water. I didn't like that. We traveled 2 km and that way I filled up at another station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4Nkx1UWFBEAE
